creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #3)
Yeah, there's likely going to be a number of ports with stale or bogus patch files that now fail.  Another example: bug 250871

Antoine, is there a list of more ports that are now failing at the 'patch' stage or does the exp-run stop at the first error?
